General.Name: Agrimin Ltd
General.Description: Agrimin Limited primarily engages in the exploration and development of potash projects in Western Australia. The company focuses on the production of sulphate of potash. It holds a 100% interest in the Mackay Potash project, comprising nine granted exploration licenses, covering approximately 3,000 square kilometers located in Western Australia. The company was formerly known as Global Resources Corporation Limited and changed its name to Agrimin Limited in December 2014. The company was incorporated in 2006 and is based in Subiaco, Australia.
